DataKitObjectTemplate.entityPayload: {"modelArtifact":{"inputTypes":[{"isDefault":true,"name":"Text","description":"A text-based input type.","label":"Text","maxInputToken":8192}],"generativeModelType":"Text","description":"OpenAI GPT 4","label":"OpenAI GPT 4","modelType":"Generative","runtimeType":"External","foundationalModel":{"majorVersionName":"OpenAIGPT4","modelIdentifier":"gpt-4-0613","minorVersionName":null,"foundationalModelName":"OpenAIGPT4","modelProviderName":"OpenAI","internalVersionNumber":2},"modelCount":3,"inputFields":[],"modelCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"outputFields":[],"sourceType":"OutOfTheBox","name":"OpenAIGPT4","namespace":"llmgateway","outputTypes":[{"isDefault":true,"name":"Text","description":"A text-based output type.","label":"Text"}],"deprecationConfiguration":{},"parameters":[{"minValue":0,"applicableCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"defaultValue":0.5,"maxValue":2,"overridable":true,"description":"The sampling temperature, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. ","parameterName":"temperature","type":"Continuous"},{"minValue":1,"applicableCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"maxValue":8192,"overridable":true,"description":"The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.","parameterName":"max_tokens","type":"Continuous"},{"minValue":-2,"applicableCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"defaultValue":0,"maxValue":2,"overridable":true,"description":"Can reduce the repetitiveness of generated tokens. The higher the value, the stronger a penalty is applied to previously present tokens, proportional to how many times they have already appeared in the prompt or prior generation.","parameterName":"frequency_penalty","type":"Continuous"},{"minValue":-2,"applicableCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"defaultValue":0,"maxValue":2,"overridable":true,"description":"Can reduce the repetitiveness of generated tokens. Behaves similarly to `frequency_penalty`, except that this penalty is applied equally to all tokens that have already appeared, regardless of their exact frequencies.","parameterName":"presence_penalty","type":"Continuous"}],"jsonModes":[],"status":"Enabled"},"configuredModel":{"inputTypes":[{"isDefault":true,"name":"Text","description":"A text-based input type.","label":"Text","maxInputToken":8192}],"connectorType":"OpenAI","visibility":"Shown","actionableFields":[],"description":"GPT4 with low temperature and less penalties","parameterOverrides":[{"parameterName":"frequency_penalty","type":"Continuous","value":-1},{"parameterName":"presence_penalty","type":"Continuous","value":-1},{"parameterName":"temperature","type":"Continuous","value":0.2}],"label":"GPT4-strict","modelType":"Generative","artifact":{"name":"OpenAIGPT4","namespace":"llmgateway","label":"OpenAI GPT 4"},"modelCapabilities":["ChatCompletion"],"capability":"ChatCompletion","setupType":"OutOfTheBox","activations":[],"name":"GPT4_strict_CM_12l_fuT0ac9f616","outputTypes":[{"isDefault":true,"name":"Text","description":"A text-based output type.","label":"Text"}],"deprecationConfiguration":{"rollOverModelArtifactReference":{}},"jsonModes":[],"status":"Enabled"}}
